title: Noun
description: A Noun is a core entity of a business domain — a named thing that the system tracks, manages, or operates on. Nouns have identity, persist over time, and are the subject of Verbs.

name.description: The singular PascalCase name of the noun.

description.description: A human-readable explanation of what this noun represents in the domain.

domain.description: The dot-separated domain path this noun belongs to.

attributes.description: The attributes (fields) that describe this noun.

verbs.description: The verbs (actions) that can be performed on this noun.

examples.description: Representative example records for this noun. Used as stub data when the API is unavailable.

examples.name: Loan
examples.description: A financial loan issued to a borrower with repayment terms.
